summary: Completed testing of 5 new Addrika e-commerce features: Admin PIN change to 110078, Username field in registration, Username availability API, Carrier dropdown in shipping modal, and Track Order carrier links. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%) and all 5 frontend features verified via UI automation.

1_admin_pin_110078.details: Admin login with new PIN 110078 works correctly. Old PIN (123456) correctly rejected with 401 error.

2_username_registration_field.details: Username (Optional) field visible in registration form with @ prefix, green checkmark for availability, helper text: 'Letters, numbers, underscores only. Min 3 chars.'

validations_tested: Too short (<3 chars) returns {available: false, error: 'Username must be at least 3 characters'}
Starts with number returns {available: false, error: 'Username cannot start with a number'}

4_carrier_dropdown_shipping_modal.details: Modal shows 'Shipping Details' with Delivery Partner dropdown (13 options) and Tracking Number/AWB field

5_track_order_carrier_links.details: getTrackingUrl() function in TrackOrder.jsx includes tracking URLs for all new carriers including Rapido, Dunzo, Porter

additional_features_verified.wipe_data_endpoint: POST /api/admin/wipe-data requires admin auth and confirmation 'WIPE_ALL_DATA'
additional_features_verified.restore_order_endpoint: POST /api/admin/orders/restore requires admin auth and validates required fields

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test order ADD-TEST-002
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Admin PIN is 110078, Username field in registration works with real-time availability check, Shipping modal has 13 carrier options (8 standard + 5 hyperlocal), Track Order page has tracking URLs for all carriers. Firebase push notifications are PLACEHOLDER setup (not mocked, just not configured with real credentials).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a feature verification, not bug fixing
